Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce a Python dictionary with activity pairs and estimated average times and standard deviations The activities list SS OP RC QI CA PT PK WS DT AS Need to consider pairs that eventually follow each other in at least one execution So we need to include many pairs possibly non consecutive Provide reasonable estimates Since no explicit numbers given we can estimate plausible times seconds

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets think SS to OP maybe days supplier selection Could be 2 days 172800 sec with std 50000 OP to RC maybe 1 day 86400 sec with std 30000 RC to QI maybe 12 hours 43200 sec QI to CA maybe 2 days 172800 sec CA to PT maybe 3 days 259200 sec PT to PK maybe 1 day 86400 sec PK to WS maybe 0 point 5 day 43200 sec WS to DT maybe 1 day 86400 sec DT to AS maybe 2 days 172800 sec Also non consecutive pairs SS to RC skip OP maybe 3 days 259200 sec SS to QI maybe 5 days 432000 sec etc

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Provide a representative subset not all 55 pairs 10 activities implies 45 pairs Well include many but not all ensure complexity by including pairs separated by multiple steps
